title: Resolutions to Pay Prior Years Obligations to the National Telecommunication Commission Regional Office No. Iv Regarding Registration Expensnes with Fines of Existing Communication Facilities of the Municipality of Los Baños Amounting to More or Less Forty-five Thousad Pesos (PHP 45,000.00) Chargeable Against the Current Approriations for the Same Expense Item. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 09/14/2020)
